calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Permanent Injuction-Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Julia Veit, Esq. for Plaintiff: Golden Gate Bridge Highway and Transport District.
Plaintiff's Witness: Capt. Miahcel Locati, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Isabel Eckes for permanent injuction and costs of $515.00.
Counsel to prepare a Proposed Judgment and submit to this Dept. for signature.

Mar. 7, 2007
Proposed Judgment received in court, granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
